jd:
Hello Connections,

We are looking to  an AI Technical Lead with the below skill set to support our client at St. Louis, MO (Onsite). Interested candidates are encouraged to share their resumes with vinod.pv@sensiple.com.

Position: AI Technical Lead

Work Location: St. Louis, MO (Onsite)

Duration: Contract to Hire (W2)

Key Responsibilities:

Technical Leadership:

️Lead the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML and Generative AI solutions.

️Define AI architecture, coding standards, and development best practices.

️Mentor and guide AI developers, data scientists, and engineers.

️Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to quality and security standards.

️Drive technical decision-making and solution design discussions.

AI/ML Development:

️Develop and implement machine learning models for predictive analytics, classification, clustering, recommendation systems, and NLP use cases.

️Design and build Generative AI applications using Large Language Models (LLMs).

️Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and AI orchestration frameworks.

️Optimize model performance, scalability, and reliability. Develop APIs and microservices for AI solution integration.

Stakeholder Management:

️Collaborate with business analysts, product owners, and stakeholders to understand requirements.

️Translate business challenges into AI-driven solutions.

️Present technical solutions and recommendations to leadership teams.

Project Delivery:

️Lead AI project planning, estimation, and execution.

️Ensure timely delivery of AI initiatives with high quality.

️Manage risks, dependencies, and technical challenges throughout the project lifecycle.

Required Skills:

AI & Machine Learning:

️Strong experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI.

️Experience with LLMs such as OpenAI GPT models, Anthropic Claude, and open-source models like Meta Llama.

️Hands-on experience with NLP, Computer Vision, and predictive analytics.

️Knowledge of model training, fine-tuning, evaluation, and deployment.

Programming & Frameworks:

️Expert-level proficiency in Python.

️Experience with AI/ML frameworks: TensorFlow PyTorch Scikit-learn LangChain LlamaIndex

️Experience with REST APIs and microservices architecture.

Cloud & Data Platforms:

️Experience with cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud.

️Experience with MLOps and deployment tools.

️Knowledge of vector databases and knowledge management platforms.

DevOps & MLOps:

️Experience with CI/CD pipelines.

️Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and model deployment frameworks.

️Understanding of AI governance, security, and responsible AI practices.

Thanks & Regards,

Vinod P V

vinod.pv@sensiple.com

Sensiple, Inc.

… more

IMPORTANT NOTE

Please read the complete information before sharing your resume.

If you’re interested, ping us on WhatsApp to discuss further.

We're Hiring: Integration & Enterprise Architecture Lead

Location: Remote

Contract: W2 or 1099 Only

We are seeking an experienced Integration & Enterprise Architecture Lead to drive enterprise-wide integration, migration, and modernization initiatives. This role requires a strong blend of architecture leadership, systems integration expertise, and stakeholder management skills.

Required Experience:

10+ years of experience in Enterprise Architecture, Systems Integration, Data Migration, and Identity & Access Management (IAM)

Strong knowledge of Enterprise Architecture principles and governance frameworks

Hands-on experience with Microsoft 365 (O365), Workday, Salesforce (SFDC), and IAM technologies

Expertise in Enterprise Application Integration and Data Migration strategies

Experience supporting large-scale transformation and modernization programs

Ability to identify, assess, and manage technical dependencies and project risks

Strong collaboration skills with business stakeholders, business analysts, and technical teams

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with phased migration and deployment programs

Exposure to mergers, acquisitions, and divestiture initiatives

Familiarity with hybrid cloud and multi-platform enterprise environments

Knowledge of architecture governance, technology roadmaps, and strategic planning

Key Responsibilities:

• Lead enterprise integration and migration initiatives

• Provide architecture oversight and technical leadership

• Drive technology transformation and modernization programs

• Define and govern integration strategies and best practices

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful delivery of strategic initiatives

If you have a strong background in enterprise architecture, integration strategy, cloud transformation, and large-scale migration programs, we'd love to connect.

Interested candidates can share their updated resume or reach out directly to vandana.v@highbrowtechnology.com

Hiring: Sr. Technical Business Relationship Manager

Location: Mettawa, IL (Hybrid Preferred | Strong Remote Candidates in Central Time Zone Considered)

Duration: 8+ Months ( with Strong Extension Potential)

Visa - ANY

We are seeking a highly experienced Sr. Technical Business Relationship Manager / Senior IT Business Analyst to support Commercial Finance systems and business initiatives. This role requires a strong blend of business analysis, stakeholder management, data analysis, and technical coordination across enterprise platforms and teams.

Key Responsibilities:

Partner with business stakeholders and IT teams to support Commercial Finance applications and initiatives

Gather, analyze, and document business requirements, functional specifications, and process improvements

Conduct gap analysis, ad hoc data analysis, and provide actionable insights to support business decision-making

Coordinate across cross-functional teams including Business, SAP, Middleware, Reporting, Data Engineering, and Infrastructure teams

Support testing activities including SIT, UAT, defect management, and production validation

Manage production support activities, issue resolution, and change management processes

Utilize ServiceNow for incident management, change requests, and ITSM workflows

Support enterprise data initiatives leveraging AWS, Snowflake, Oracle, Data Warehouses, and Data Lake environments

Required Skills:

Strong IT Business Analyst / Business Systems Analyst experience

Excellent stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination skills

Strong SQL skills for:

• Ad Hoc Analysis

• Data Validation

• Gap Analysis

• Business Insights

Experience working between business and technical teams in large enterprise environments

Requirements Gathering & Documentation

Functional Specifications & Business Process Analysis

Testing, UAT Coordination, and Production Support

ServiceNow Experience

Reporting & Dashboard Enhancement Experience

Preferred Skills:

Commercial Finance Domain Experience

Revenue Management

Rebates Management

Gross-to-Net (GTN)

Pricing & Commercial Reporting

AWS Cloud Services

Snowflake

Oracle Databases

Enterprise Data Warehouses

Data Lakes

QlikView

Power BI

SAP Ecosystem Exposure

Excellent communication and relationship management skills

Experience managing multiple projects and stakeholders simultaneously

Interested candidates share your updated resume to jagadeesh@fusionlifesolutions.com or DM me Directly

Role: Project Manager

Location: Iselin, NJ

Note: Only on W2

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead the delivery of strategic initiatives involving Actimize platforms, AI-driven solutions, and enterprise data programs. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in financial services, proven expertise managing complex technology projects, and experience coordinating cross-functional teams across business and technical domains.

Experience with NICE Actimize is highly preferred. Candidates with recent exposure to Artificial Intelligence initiatives, ETL/data integration programs, and financial crime compliance projects will be strongly considered.

Required Qualifications

·       Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Business Administration, Finance, or a related field.

·       8+ years of Project Management experience delivering enterprise technology initiatives.

·       Demonstrated experience managing projects in the Banking or Financial Services industry.

·       Strong understanding of project management methodologies, including Agile, Scrum, and Waterfall.

·       Experience managing ETL and Data Warehouse projects involving tools such as Informatica, Talend, DataStage, SSIS, or cloud-native ETL platforms.

·       Experience leading cross-functional teams consisting of business analysts, developers, QA teams, and data engineers.

·       Excellent communication, stakeholder management, negotiation, and leadership skills.

·       Proficiency with project management tools such as Jira, Confluence, Microsoft Project, or similar.

Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)

·       Hands-on experience with NICE Actimize implementations or enhancements.

·       Strong financial services background, particularly in:

o  Anti-Money Laundering (AML)

o  Fraud Detection and Prevention

o  Financial Crime Compliance

o  Risk Management

·       Recent experience delivering AI/Generative AI initiatives, including predictive analytics, intelligent automation, or machine learning projects.

·       Familiarity with cloud environments such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.

Interested please share resumes to charan@rits-it.com
